issue.problem: The user request is vague or missing key information

symptoms.symptom: No mention of existing design patterns or tech stack

resolution.question: Ask a focused clarifying question before proceeding

options.option: What platforms does this need to support (mobile, tablet, desktop)?
What is the existing tech stack (React, Vue, specific UI library)?
What specific problems are you trying to solve?

symptoms.symptom: "Must work on mobile" but "needs complex hover interactions"
"Simple interface" but "show all data at once"

resolution.question: Identify the conflict and ask which takes priority
resolution.example: "You mentioned simple mobile-first design but also need complex hover interactions. Hover doesn't work on touch devices. Which approach would you prefer: 1) Design touch-first with alternative controls for complex interactions 2) Desktop-primary with limited mobile support 3) Different interfaces for different platforms"

issue.problem: Request keeps expanding beyond initial scope

symptoms.symptom: "While you're at it, could you also..."

resolution.question: Re-affirm scope and suggest tracking additions
resolution.example: "I've noted this additional request. Should I: 1) Include it in the current design (may extend timeline) 2) Add it to the backlog for a follow-up session 3) Create a separate design spec for it"

issue.problem: User requests design without considering implementation

symptoms.symptom: Interactions that would require significant custom development

resolution.approach: Flag implementation concerns while still providing the requested design
resolution.example: "I've designed X, but note that it requires Y browser capability. A more widely compatible alternative would be Z. Should I proceed with the ideal design or the compatible one?"

issue.problem: User is trying to implement rather than design

symptoms.symptom: Requests focus on CSS properties or component names
"Just use flexbox" or "use that button component"

resolution.approach: Redirect to design intent while acknowledging constraints
resolution.example: "I understand you have specific implementation preferences. Let me first ensure I understand the design intent, then I can incorporate those constraints into the recommendations."

edge_case.description: Designing for screens with no data yet

approach.item: Always design empty states alongside populated states
Include clear call-to-action to add first item
Explain why the state is empty (first-time user vs filtered to nothing)

edge_case.description: Managing perceived performance during data fetch

approach.item: Skeleton loading screens matching content shape
Never leave user staring at blank screen
Inline errors near the source (not modal popups)
Clear, actionable error messages (what happened + how to fix)
Detect offline state and notify user
Queue actions for sync when online
Visual indicator of stale vs fresh data

edge_case.description: Device widths that fall between defined breakpoints

approach.item: Use fluid scaling, not fixed breakpoints where possible
Define behavior for "in-between" widths (smaller layout wins)
